data.content:
Pass evaluation evidence for the `implementation` step:
- Commit: 10ce3af8d51bc21e3a6ac1f68f9f5c875dd42d34
- Branch: worktree-knots-99d4-gate-eval-prompt
- Expected: the gate evaluating claim prompt must carry knot Context, Acceptance Criteria, explicit gate metadata, evidence-first evaluation guidance, and the Foolery override before any completion transition.
- Actual: the builtin gate prompt and live gate claim prompt now render `## Context`, `## Acceptance Criteria`, `gate.owner_kind`, `gate.failure_modes[...]`, `## Your job`, `## Exit conditions`, and `## Override of Foolery preamble`.
- Regression checks:
  - cargo test render_gate_prompt_uses_context_heading_and_explicit_metadata_labels -- --nocapture
  - cargo test gate_evaluate_render_for_profile_contains_required_evaluation_guidance -- --nocapture
  - cargo test claim_prompt_for_gate_surfaces_acceptance_context_and_evaluation_rules -- --nocapture
- Repo verification:
  - make lint
  - make test
  - pre-push hook make coverage passed at 95.15% coverage
- Coverage artifact: /tmp/knots-99d4/coverage/cobertura.xml
